config.script:
'MessageBox #include "50122"
class CLicenceCodec private m_strExData 'db content private m_strModCode 'module code i.e. EB32 private m_nUserCount 'users count private m_nDays4Free private m_dtLastRun private m_strUnlock private m_strUserId
private sub class_initialize() m_strExData = "" m_strModCode = "" m_nUserCount = 0 m_nDays4Free = 0 m_dtLastRun = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_strUnlock = "?" m_strUserId = "?" end sub
'----------------------------------------------- public sub init_temporary(byval strModCode) m_strExData = "" m_strModCode = strModCode m_nUserCount = 1 m_nDays4Free = 30 end sub
public sub init_from_parts(byval strModCode,byval strUserId) m_strExData = "" m_strModCode = strModCode m_nUserCount = 1 m_nDays4Free = 0 m_dtLastRun = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_strUserId = strUserId end sub
'----------------------------------------------- public function init_from_ctrl_str(byval strControl) init_from_ctrl_str = false '-decode- dim position dim strTmp : strTmp = "" dim charVal for position = 1 to len(strControl) charVal = asc(mid(strControl,position,1)) if position Mod 3 = 0 then 'GUCIO charVal = charVal - 2 end if strTmp = strTmp + Chr( charVal ) next
'---- rozpakowywanie dim tmpArray set tmpArray=trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
tmpArray.Separate strTmp, "-"
if tmpArray.Count() <> 7 then exit function end if
m_strExData = mid(tmpArray.Value(0), 2) m_strModcode = tmpArray.Value(1)
if not isNumeric(tmpArray.Value(2)) then exit function end if
m_nUserCount = clng(tmpArray.Value(2)) if m_nUserCount <= 0 or m_nUserCount > 199 then exit function end if
if not isNumeric(tmpArray.Value(3)) then exit function end if
m_nDays4Free = clng(tmpArray.Value(3)) if m_nDays4Free < 0 or m_nDays4Free > 32 then exit function end if
dim strDay : strDay=Mid(tmpArray.Value(4), 1, 2) dim strMonth : strMonth=Mid(tmpArray.Value(4), 3, 2) dim strYear : strYear=Mid(tmpArray.Value(4), 5, len(tmpArray.Value(4))-4)
if (not isNumeric(strDay) or _ not isNumeric(strMonth) or _ not isNumeric(strYear)) then exit function end if
if (CLng(strDay)>31 or CLng(strDay)<1) or _ (CLng(strMonth)>12 or CLng(strMonth)<1) then exit function end if
m_dtLastRun=DateSerial(CLng(strYear), CLng(strMonth), CLng(strDay))
m_strUnlock = tmpArray.Value(5) m_strUserId = replace(tmpArray.Value(6),"!","-")
if (m_strUnlock <> "?") and (left(tmpArray.Value(0),1) <> "C") then exit function end if
init_from_ctrl_str = true end function
public function get_ctrl_str() dim strKey : strKey = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("C%1-%2-%3-%4-%5-%6-%7") _ (m_strExData)(m_strModcode)(m_nUserCount)(m_nDays4Free) _ (Date2StringDDMMYYYY(m_dtLastRun))(m_strUnlock)(replace(m_strUserId,"-","!")).done()
'-encode- dim strTmp : strTmp = "" dim charVal dim position for position = 1 to len(strKey) charVal = asc(mid(strKey,position,1)) if position Mod 3 = 0 then 'GUCIO charVal = charVal + 2 end if strTmp = strTmp + Chr( charVal ) next
get_ctrl_str = strTmp end function
public function get_display_key() dim nUserId : nUserId = clng(0) dim iter dim cChar for iter = 1 to len(m_strUserId) cChar = mid(m_strUserId,iter,1) if cChar >= "0" and cChar <= "9" then nUserId = nUserId * 7 + (asc(cChar) - asc("0")) else nUserId = nUserId * 5 end if next get_display_key = m_strModCode + "/" + cstr(m_nUserCount) + "/" + cstr(nUserId) + "/" + left(m_strExData,4) end function
public function get_unlock_key(byval strDisplayKey) strDisplayKey = trim(ucase(strDisplayKey))
dim cyKey cyKey = ccur(100813.1855)
dim i for i = 1 to len(strDisplayKey) dim cItem cItem = mid(strDisplayKey, i, 1)
if cItem >= "0" and cItem <= "9" then cyKey = 16+cyKey + ccur((cyKey - Fix(cyKey)) / 10 + ccur(asc(cItem)-asc("0"))/10000) elseif cItem >= "A" and cItem <= "Z" then cyKey = cyKey + ccur(ccur(4+asc(cItem)-asc("A")) * exp(8+i mod 5)) end if next get_unlock_key = cstr(ccur(fix(cyKey * 10000))) end function
public sub to_licence_obj(byref pLicObj) pLicObj.strKod = m_strModcode pLicObj.dDataWazn = dateserial(2001,4,m_nDays4Free) pLicObj.strIdUser = m_strUserId pLicObj.nStanowiska = clng(m_nUserCount) pLicObj.strKontrola = get_ctrl_str() pLicObj.strLogin = "?" end sub
public function check_from_licence_obj(byref pLicObj) 'wczytaj i sprawdz poprawnosc kodu licencji if ( not init_from_ctrl_str(pLicObj.strKontrola) ) then check_from_licence_obj = -3 ' invalid licence exit function end if
'sprawdz poprawnosc zapisanej daty w kodzie licencji if (pLicObj.dDataWazn <> dateserial(2001,4,m_nDays4Free)) then check_from_licence_obj = -4 ' invalid licence exit function end if
'sprawdzamy liczbe stanowisk if (pLicObj.nStanowiska <> usercount) then check_from_licence_obj = -5 ' invalid licence exit function end if
if unlockcode <> "?" then check_from_licence_obj = 0 else if m_nDays4Free <= 0 then check_from_licence_obj = -1 else check_from_licence_obj = days4free end if end if end function '----------------------------------------------- public property get days4free days4free = m_nDays4Free end property
public property let days4free(nDays) m_nDays4Free = nDays end property
public property get usercount usercount = m_nUserCount end property
public property let usercount(byval nUserCount) m_nUserCount = nUserCount end property
public property get lastrun lastrun = m_dtLastRun end property
public property let unlockcode(byval strUnlockCode) m_strUnlock = strUnlockCode end property
public property get unlockcode unlockcode = m_strUnlock end property
public property let lastrun(byval dtLastRun) m_dtLastRun = dtLastRun end property
public property let userid(byval strUserId) m_strUserId = strUserId end property
public property get userid userid = m_strUserId end property
'---------------------------------------- private function Date2StringDDMMYYYY(byval dValid) Date2StringDDMMYYYY=trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Day(dValid),2)+trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Month(dValid),2)+CStr(Year(dValid)) end function end class
function new_licence_codec() set new_licence_codec = new CLicenceCodec end function
dim pM60106 : set pM60106 = doc_.getmodule(60106)
private function get_licence_idobj(byval nOneModMask) get_licence_idobj = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5LICENCJA,"strKod='EB" + cstr(nOneModMask)+"'") end function
private function create_temp_licence_obj(byval nOneModMask) create_temp_licence_obj = -1 dim pSubTrans set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() dim pLicObj : set pLicObj = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5LICENCJA) dim idLic : idLic = pLicObj.idobj
dim pLicKey : set pLicKey = new_licence_codec() pLicKey.init_temporary "EB" + cstr(nOneModMask) pLicKey.lastrun = trans_.var(GVAR_SYSDATE) pLicKey.to_licence_obj pLicObj
if trans_.saveobjects then create_temp_licence_obj = idLic end if end function
function get_create_licence_obj(byval nOneModMask,byval bAllowCreate) set get_create_licence_obj = nothing
dim idLic : idLic = get_licence_idobj(nOneModMask) if idLic < 0 then err.raise 7000,"Zarządzanie licencjami","Zduplikowany klucz licencji" end if
if idLic = 0 then if bAllowCreate then idLic = create_temp_licence_obj(nOneModMask) else err.raise 7000,"Zarządzanie licencjami","Brak obiektu licencji" end if end if if idLic < 0 then err.raise 7000,"Zarządzanie licencjami","Zapis licencji niemożliwy" end if
set get_create_licence_obj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5LICENCJA,idLic) end function
function get_create_licence_objects(byval bAllowCreate) set get_create_licence_objects = nothing
dim arrLicObj : set arrLicObj = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() dim iter dim nEBModMask : nEBModMask = 1 for iter = 0 to 5 arrLicObj.Add get_create_licence_obj(nEBModMask, bAllowCreate) if arrLicObj.Value(iter) is nothing then exit function end if nEBModMask = nEBModMask + nEBModMask next
set get_create_licence_objects = arrLicObj end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'sprawdza poprawnosc licencji ' rezultat < -1 -> błąd / nieprawidłowa licencja ' rezultat = -1 -> OK, licencja tymczasowa nieważna - musisz zarejestrować ' rezultat = 0 -> OK, stała licencja ' rezultat > 0 -> OK, licencja tymczasowa ważna jeszcze rezultat dni '---------------------------------------------------------------------- function get_licence_info_and_update(byref pLicObj) dim pLicKey : set pLicKey = new_licence_codec() get_licence_info_and_update = pLicKey.check_from_licence_obj(pLicObj) if get_licence_info_and_update > 0 then dim dtSystemDate : dtSystemDate = trans_.var(GVAR_SYSDATE) if pLicKey.lastrun > dtSystemDate then get_licence_info_and_update = -6 else if pLicKey.lastrun < dtSystemDate then pLicKey.days4free = pLicKey.days4free - 1 pLicKey.lastrun = dtSystemDate pLicKey.to_licence_obj pLicObj end if end if end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'result: '-1 - error ' 0 - OK '+1 - registration required '+2 - registration suggested '---------------------------------------------------------------------- function check_licences_on_start() check_licences_on_start = -1 dim pArrLic : set pArrLic = get_create_licence_objects(false) if pArrLic is nothing then exit function end if
dim bRegistrationRequired : bRegistrationRequired = false dim bRegistrationSuggested : bRegistrationSuggested = false dim iter dim nEBModMask : nEBModMask = 1 for iter = 0 to pArrLic.UpperIndex() dim nLicInfo : nLicInfo = get_licence_info_and_update(pArrLic.value(iter)) if nLicInfo < -1 then MessageBox "Nieaktualna informacja o licencji, kod:" + cstr(nLicInfo) + "," + cstr(pArrLic.value(iter).strKontrola), "Nieprawidłowa sytuacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation check_licences_on_start = +1 exit function end if if nLicInfo >= 0 then pM60106.LicCR nEBModMask, pArrLic.value(iter).nStanowiska else pM60106.LicCR nEBModMask, 0 bRegistrationRequired = true end if if nLicInfo <> 0 then bRegistrationSuggested = true 'update lastrun end if nEBModMask = nEBModMask + nEBModMask next if not trans_.saveobjects then exit function end if check_licences_on_start = 0 if bRegistrationSuggested then check_licences_on_start = +2 end if if bRegistrationRequired then check_licences_on_start = +1 end if end function
